name: Ripco
description_short: Ripco is a member-owned credit union offering personal loans, mortgages, HELOCs, and deposit products with rates as low as 5.25% APR on home loans.
description_long:
Ripco Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial cooperative serving consumers seeking alternatives to traditional banks. The organization has been operating for at least 94 years, as evidenced by their upcoming 94th Annual Meeting scheduled for April 28. As a federally-insured credit union (NCUA-insured), Ripco provides financial products and services designed around member needs rather than profit maximization.

Ripco's service offerings include personal loans (as low as 8.99% APR), home loans and mortgages (as low as 5.25% APR), Home Equity Lines of Credit (HELOCs) with promotional fee waivers, and deposit products including CDs (as high as 3.29% APY). They also offer auto financing with promotional incentives (90 days no payment plus up to $500 cash back), LoanPay Xpress, and video banking services. The credit union provides both personal and business online banking platforms, supporting account opening and loan applications through digital channels.

Ripco distinguishes itself through community engagement, hosting RipcoFest (a free community celebration on May 9th) and promoting membership benefits for "people who are going places." Their video banking solution allows real-time member interaction for account services, membership questions, and loan support. Limited-time promotional offerings—such as waived $325 HELOC processing fees and auto loan cash-back incentives—reflect competitive positioning in the credit union market.

As a credit union, Ripco benefits from member-owned governance and NCUA insurance protection up to $250,000 per account category. However, the website provides limited detail on membership eligibility requirements, fee schedules, specific loan terms, or service limitations. Consumers should verify membership criteria and compare rates/terms against other credit unions and banks before applying.
services: Home loans and mortgages (as low as 5.25% APR)
Home Equity Lines of Credit (HELOCs) with fee waivers
Certificate of Deposit (CDs) products (as high as 3.29% APY)
pros: Federally insured (NCUA) member-owned credit union with 94+ years of operating history
Competitive rates: home loans as low as 5.25% APR, personal loans from 8.99% APR, CDs to 3.29% APY
HELOC promotion waiving $325 processing fee and eliminating annual fees
Auto financing promotion offering 90 days no payment plus up to $500 cash back
Video banking service for real-time member support without branch visit
Dual online banking platforms for personal and business accounts
Community engagement through RipcoFest and member-focused initiatives
cons: Website does not clearly display membership eligibility requirements or restrictions
Limited transparency on complete fee schedules, penalties, or service charges
No information about minimum balance requirements, account minimums, or term lengths
best_for: Consumers seeking competitive mortgage and home equity financing with no annual HELOC fees
Auto buyers looking for promotional auto loans with extended no-payment periods and cash incentives
Community-oriented members who value not-for-profit governance and member-owned financial institutions
diagnosis: Ripco is best for credit union members seeking competitive mortgage, HELOC, and auto financing with the security of NCUA insurance and member-owned governance. The main caveat is that membership eligibility and detailed terms/fees are not transparent on the website, so potential members must contact Ripco directly to confirm access and compare specific rates and conditions against alternatives.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Ripco — Credit Union in Rhinelander, WI | CreditDoc
meta_description: Ripco — NCUA-insured credit union in Rhinelander, WI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
